title: syringa glabra
intro: Syringa glabra, also known as the white flowering lilac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Syringa glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
